ground_truth.title: Quality Assurance and Testing for Web and Mobile Apps
ground_truth.main_content:
Quality Engineering and Digital Assurance

Everest Group positions QBurst as a Major Contender in Quality Engineering (QE) Specialist Services and Enterprise QE PEAK Matrix Assessments 2025.

AI-Powered Quality Engineering for Modern Software Delivery

Traditional QA struggles to match the speed and complexity of modern, multi-platform releases. At QBurst, we harness AI-driven testing platforms, intelligent automation, and agile QE strategies to accelerate delivery without compromising quality. Our approach ensures faster release cycles, broader coverage, and secure, stable applications from day one.

Solutions

Quality Engineering Solutions That Drive Results

Multi-Point Web Health Assessment
Enhance stability and user experience through a comprehensive assessment of speed, SEO, accessibility, reliability, and security.

Smart Defect Insights Engine
Gain actionable insights from defect patterns to enhance quality, prevent recurring issues, and accelerate software release cycles.

Intelligent Test Case Generator
Reduce manual effort with optimized, high-coverage test cases generated from user stories, requirements, or application flows.

Auto-Healing Test Automation
Minimize test failures and downtime with AI-driven automation that adapts seamlessly to UI changes.

AI-Driven Test Management
Streamline your testing lifecycle with AI-powered test prioritization, risk prediction, and actionable insights.

Security and Performance Testing
Ensure compliance with performance and security standards by validating system resilience under loads and detecting vulnerabilities.

Impact Stories

Enabling Success Through Quality Engineering

Boosting Release Speed with QA Automation
See how we helped a healthcare provider accelerate releases and cut regression cycles while ensuring quality.

Ensuring Quality for Smart Home Devices
Explore how we reduced release time and improved stability across web, mobile, and firmware.

Elevating E-Commerce Quality for Retailer
Learn how we delivered faster, consistent releases for a global apparel brand through automation.

Platforms

Capabilities

Our Quality Engineering Offerings

Ensuring Reliability With Functional Testing
We deliver comprehensive functional testing to validate every feature, ensuring reliable, high-quality software that aligns with business goals and consistently meets user expectations.

Accelerating Releases Through Automation
Our automation frameworks accelerate test cycles, expand coverage, and minimize manual effort, enabling consistent, repeatable results across diverse platforms and complex application landscapes.

Safeguarding Applications and Data
We conduct thorough security testing to uncover vulnerabilities, close gaps, and ensure compliance, safeguarding your applications, data, and digital assets against evolving threats.

Optimizing Application Performance
Our experts evaluate application performance under varying loads to identify bottlenecks, enhance speed, and deliver smooth, scalable, and reliable experiences for every user.

Verifying Accuracy of AI/ML Models
We deliver specialized AI/ML testing to validate model accuracy, efficiency, and test coverage, ensuring dependable, trustworthy AI-driven outcomes in real-world production environments.

Continuous Application Quality Checks
Our approach incorporates testing into DevOps pipelines, enabling continuous validation of functionality, performance, and security throughout the release lifecycle.

Ensuring Accuracy in Data Migration
We ensure accuracy, completeness, and consistency of data during migration, facilitating seamless transitions without loss, corruption, or compliance risks.

Quality Engineering Consulting
Our experts assess your testing landscape, recommend proven best practices, and lead transformation initiatives to improve efficiency, elevate quality, and accelerate delivery timelines.

Accelerators

QE Accelerators for End-to-End Efficiency

QTAF
An omnichannel test automation that unifies multiple toolchains, including Java-Selenium, JavaScript/TypeScript-Playwright, and Python-Playwright, under a single platform to support scalable, cross-technology test automation.

TestCrest
An integrated non-functional testing toolkit designed to validate SEO compliance, client-side performance, accessibility standards, and link integrity, ensuring superior digital experiences and compliance.

FlowTrace
A record-and-playback accelerator that captures user interactions and associated metadata to enable rapid functional and non-functional automation through native integrations with QTAF and TestCrest.

TestMate
This AI-powered test management solution integrates seamlessly with project management tools and streamlines the organization of test cases into suites, enabling efficient execution of automated runs for selected suites.

Defectron
An advanced failure prediction engine built on the QBurst LLM Gateway that analyzes historical defect data to infer root causes, assess business impact, recommend fixes, and deliver actionable KPIs for faster resolution.

Analytics Dashboard
The Analytics Dashboard consolidates automation execution results from QTAF and other custom frameworks, offering a unified, interactive view of execution trends, failure patterns, and quality metrics.

SPEAR
SPEAR is a dedicated security testing platform that provides penetration testing, vulnerability assessments, detailed reporting, and actionable risk analysis to strengthen organizational security posture.

Test Case Generator
This generative AI-powered agentic test case generator extracts details from BRD documents, Figma designs, architecture diagrams, and project management tools to generate context-aware, traceable test scenarios that accelerate the test design process and ensure alignment with business requirements.

Insights

Thoughts and Insights on Quality Engineering

A QA Engineer's Journey to Load Testing Success
